title: Add create/update methods for Phase 2 entities in worker state
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/worker/state.ts

Read the existing file. Add full create/update methods for Phase 2 entities that currently only have getters:

1. createBuildDispatch(data): creates BuildDispatch with generated id and createdAt timestamp
2. updateBuildDispatch(id, data): partial update
3. createBuildOutput(data): creates BuildOutput with generated id and createdAt
4. updateBuildOutput(id, data): partial update
5. createReview(data): creates Review with generated id
6. updateReview(id, data): partial update
7. createRevisionEvent(data): creates RevisionEvent with generated id and createdAt
8. updateRevisionEvent(id, data): partial update

Follow the exact same pattern as createProject/updateProject. Import all types needed. Mark dirty=true in each method (the dirty flag should already exist from Phase 2). Commit.
